/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/webgl-demo.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/webgl-demo.dir/examples/webgl_demo.cpp.o" -o /home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/bin/webgl-demo   -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../webCore/build  -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../zepraScript/build/lib  -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../networking/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../webCore/build:/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../zepraScript/build/lib:/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../networking/build -lwebcore -lzepra-core -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
